nodes.label: run_loop.ps1 — Headless Claude Loop Runner (Task Scheduler)
nodes.rationale: Invoked by Windows Task Scheduler; runs claude.cmd -p with --permission-mode bypassPermissions, prompt = 'read and execute scripts/loops/<Loop>.md autonomously'; stdout/stderr redirected to reports/loops/<loop>_<stamp>.log; logs older than 30 days auto-deleted; exits with claude's exit code.

edges.source_location: header: 'Invocato da Windows Task Scheduler: powershell ... -File run_loop.ps1 -Loop ...'
prompt: 'Leggi ed esegui le istruzioni in scripts/loops/$Loop.md'

hyperedges.label: Self-Evolving Loop Pipeline (Task Scheduler → run_loop.ps1 → claude -p → loop prompts → EXPERIMENTS.md)
